apt_metadata.description:
Hex Editor for Reverse Engineers, Programmers
This package contains a Hex Editor for Reverse Engineers, Programmers and
people who value their retinas when working at 3 AM.

use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use imhex because ### imhex.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair imhex with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `imhex --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.

documentation.when_to_use: Use during the 'any' phase against surfaces [web] in the Kali Linux category. Fits when the engagement needs: ### imhex.
usage_sections: Install with: sudo apt install imhex
Install with: sudo apt install imhex
